runners.formComment: Last start finished 2nd on April 8 over 450m at Ballarat behind Reuben Hill beaten 3.5 lengths (25.45) in a Grade 5. Won at his only start from this draw. Go close again.

runners.formComment: Last start finished 5th on April 6 over 450m at this track behind Analyzation beaten 6 lengths (25.62) in a Free For All. Has run blistering time here with a 25.22 PB at the distance. Hard to beat.

runners.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 2.5 lengths over 390m at this track in a handy (22.86), beating Bayini. Among the chances and worth following up.

runners.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 6th in a Grade 4/5 on April 7 over 460m at Warragul behind Mighty Scar beaten 8 lengths (26.52). Placed two back at Geelong. Key chance on best form.
